evals.prompt: A config file changed this session. Review the docs and record the review snapshot before I push.
assertions: Invokes the revise-docs review (loads audience rules and reviews docs) rather than only writing the marker
Writes the review marker at $(git rev-parse --git-common-dir)/doc-sweep-revise-marker equal to the current HEAD commit

evals.prompt: This session updated CLAUDE.md and two README.md files. Review the docs and record the snapshot before I push.
assertions: Makes exactly ONE commit containing all the doc changes (not one commit per file)
Stages only documentation paths it edited and does NOT use git add -A / git add . (so unrelated in-flight working-tree changes are not swept into the doc commit)
Advances the review marker to the new HEAD after committing

evals.prompt: Nothing about the code changed that affects docs this session, but I want to mark docs reviewed before pushing.
assertions: Determines no documentation updates are needed and makes no commit (does not create an empty commit)
Still advances the review marker to the current HEAD so a previously-blocked push can proceed
